headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on American Electric Power, Raises Price Target to $139
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $125 to $139.

headline: Flights are already getting more expensive after jet fuel spike. When should you book?
summary: Some airlines are already raising fares after a historic surge in jet-fuel costs.

headline: Revisiting 3 Stock Picks Whose Charts Point to Buying Opportunities
summary: On the ratio chart against the  one can see how AEP has led the sector since the start of the fourth quarter.  The daily chart shows how the stock has risen above several well-formed bases, starting in July with a break above a double bottom.
